name: Linda's Creamy Peanut Butter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and peanut butter in a large bowl using an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add confectioners sugar, adjusting the amount to create a dough that is easy to shape into eggs.
3. Shape the dough into egg-sized forms and place them on a cookie sheet lined with foil or waxed paper. The candy will be slightly sticky.
4. Refrigerate the shaped candies until they firm up.
5. Melt the chocolate separately.
6. Dip each egg into the melted chocolate using a fork, ensuring it is fully coated.
7. Remove the dipped eggs from the chocolate by gently sliding them off the fork onto the lined cookie sheet.
8. Allow the chocolate to set in the refrigerator before serving or storing.
